description_long: This is a decorative double-headed street lamp with a central vertical post and two outward-extending horizontal arms, each supporting a lantern-style lamp. The lanterns have a classic, slightly flared design with open metalwork and a domed top, evoking a vintage or Victorian aesthetic. Ornate scrollwork connects the two arms above the lamps, adding an elegant flourish to the structure. The base is wide and circular, providing stability for the tall, slender post. The entire lamp appears to be made of dark metal, likely wrought iron or steel, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. This lamp is designed for outdoor urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas, where both illumination and decorative appeal are desired.
description: A vintage-style double-headed street lamp with ornate scrollwork and lantern-shaped fixtures on a tall, dark metal post. Designed for outdoor urban settings, it combines functional lighting with decorative elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lanterns, ornate scrollwork, and the full width of the horizontal arms.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the two lanterns and the slender profile of the post.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying both lanterns and the decorative scrollwork.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and vertical alignment of the lanterns.
